ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Filet de dinde 82,2%, saumure 9,3% (eau, sel, dextrose de mais, dextrose de blé, épices et plantes aromatiques, sel, arômes naturels), Barde de porc (8,5%).
